title: validate_member_patch error message hardcodes role list, not SpaceRole
description: jmap.rs validate_member_patch returns an error message built from a hardcoded literal ["admin", "moderator", "member"] rather than from SpaceRole itself. The PR's stated goal was for SpaceRole to be the single source of truth for valid roles, but this error message is a second source of truth that will silently diverge when a new SpaceRole variant is added. SpaceRole::parse will reject the new role correctly, but the error message will still list only the three old values — users get a wrong help string. Fix: add a SpaceRole::all() or a Display impl that enumerates variants, and use it in the format\!() call.
close_reason: Fixed in code; decision records documented
